data.description: A giant eagle with sharp talons and a keen eye for prey. It circles high above the land, ready to dive and snatch smaller creatures.
These enormous arachnids are highly venomous and aggressive. They often weave intricate webs to trap prey.
These small devils are the most common shapechangers and often assume the form of beautiful women.

data.speed: 20 ft., fly 40 ft. (20 ft. inral form; 20 ft., Ay 60 ft. in raven form; 20 ft., climb 20 ft. in spider form)

data.description: The imp can use its action to polymorph into the beast form of a rat, a raven, or a spider, or into its devil form. In each form, all statistics are the same, although its attack is different in some of them. Any equipment it carries is not transformed.Invisibility. The imp turns invisible until it attacks or until its concentration ends. Anything the invisible is carrying or wearing is invisible as long as it remains in contact with the imp.

H2] Bite. Melee Weapon Attaek: +5 lo hil, reach 5 fI., one crealure.

on a failed save, ar half as much damage on a successful one. If imp's darkvision.
lhe poison damage reduces lhe largel lo O hil poinls, lhe largel
is slable bul poisoned for 1 hour, and paralyzed while poisoned
in lhis way.
